{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The critique identifies the specific novelty of the 'power-weighted plurality rule' and contrasts it with existing methods, providing a clear delta from prior work.",
    "R1.7": "The critique flags multiple missing or incorrect citations (e.g., Bertsimas-Sim citation, rainflow-counting throughput penalty) and suggests precise bibliographic references where needed.",
    "RX.1": "The critique explicitly discloses uncertainty about the novelty of the method in V2G literature and the specific details of the ERCOT 2023 settlement data and degradation model citations.",
    "RX.3": "The critique stays within the scope of the provided paragraph, addressing all aspects of the content without drifting into unrelated areas.",
    "RX.4": "The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.",
    "RX.5": "Every major point in the critique is traced back to specific parts of the original paragraph, with clear annotations on what needs to be changed and why."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies the specific novelty of the 'power-weighted plurality rule' and contrasts it with existing methods, providing a clear delta from prior work.
rationale.R1.7: The critique flags multiple missing or incorrect citations (e.g., Bertsimas-Sim citation, rainflow-counting throughput penalty) and suggests precise bibliographic references where needed.
rationale.RX.1: The critique explicitly discloses uncertainty about the novelty of the method in V2G literature and the specific details of the ERCOT 2023 settlement data and degradation model citations.
rationale.RX.3: The critique stays within the scope of the provided paragraph, addressing all aspects of the content without drifting into unrelated areas.
rationale.RX.4: The critique avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could be misleading if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every major point in the critique is traced back to specific parts of the original paragraph, with clear annotations on what needs to be changed and why.
